Attendance Confirmation

Confirm Your Attendance

Members and guests planning to attend the SLPP North America New England Chapter Executive Inauguration Weekend are encouraged to complete the RSVP form so the chapter can plan seating, hospitality, security, food, and guest logistics.

No email address or Google sign-in is required. Members may also share the RSVP form link directly with chapter members, guests, and sister chapters.

Complete RSVP Form Share RSVP Link Call: (678) 301-8876
Tip: Please complete the form once for your household or delegation and include your expected number of guests. Direct form link: https://forms.gle/Ghje4oV5mDqgg6As9
Planning Details
  • Meet & Greet: Friday, August 21
  • Inauguration: Saturday, August 22
  • Cookout Picnic: Sunday, August 23
  • Location: Boston, Massachusetts

Flying to Boston?

Boston Logan International Airport

For members and guests flying in from Sister Chapters, Boston Logan International Airport is the main airport serving the Boston area.

Boston Logan International Airport (BOS) East Boston, MA 02128
Airport → Meet & Greet Airport → Inauguration
AirportBOS
Meet & GreetHyde Park
InaugurationDorchester

Recommended Hotel

Holiday Inn Express Boston

Convenient hotel option for members and guests coming for the New England Chapter Executive Inauguration weekend.

Guest Room Block

Holiday Inn Express Boston

69 Boston Street
Boston, MA 02125

Single Occupancy$215per room, per night + tax
Double Occupancy$235per room, per night + tax
  • Complimentary hot & cold breakfast buffet
  • Free parking for guests
  • Free Wi‑Fi
  • Microwave & refrigerator in rooms
  • Near MBTA Red Line access
  • Airport shuttle: $10/person
Guest note: Group rates are available for Friday, August 21 through Sunday, August 23, 2026. Rates include complimentary hot and cold breakfast each morning. Please contact the hotel directly and mention the SLPP North America New England Chapter inauguration weekend.

Explore Boston

Make the Weekend Memorable

If you are traveling from another chapter, use the weekend to experience Boston's history, waterfront, culture, and New England charm. Click any photo below for a short video tour, or use Directions to open Google Maps from your current location.

Watch the Tour

Boston Common

America's oldest public park and a beautiful downtown gathering place.

📍 Directions
Watch the Tour

Quincy Market

Food, shopping, music, and one of Boston's most lively visitor stops.

📍 Directions
Watch the Tour

Boston Harbor

Scenic waterfront views, harbor walks, boats, restaurants, and photo moments.

📍 Directions
Watch the Tour

Freedom Trail

A historic walking route connecting landmarks from America's founding story.

📍 Directions
Watch the Tour

Museum of Fine Arts

A major cultural destination for art, history, and quiet afternoon exploration.

📍 Directions
Sister Chapters Welcome

You Are Family

Whether you are traveling from New York, DMV, Pennsylvania, New Jersey, Ohio, Canada, Arizona, Texas, Iowa, California, Georgia, or any other SLPP North America chapter, the New England Chapter is ready to welcome you with hospitality, fortitude, and love.
